title: Crimson's Lucky Block
description: My First Mod Ever. Doesnt contain much atm.
body:
Hey, I'm Crimson And This Is My First Mod Ever! This Lucky Block Only Contains Around 10 Items And 3 Events But Soon I'll Add More.

 The 10 Drops Featured in this mod are: A Cat Coin, Crimsonified Sword, Pickaxe And Armor, A Diamond, An Emerald, And An Crimsonified Ingot, Which Can Craft Crimsonified Tools And Armor.

The 3 Events In The Mod Are: An Ender Dragon, A Giant And A Pretty Big Explosion.

This Is It So Far.

If You Check It Out, Thanks!
